title: Test live log
description: As a developer, I want to view real-time application logs so that I can monitor system behavior and debug issues as they occur.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given the application is running, when I access the live log viewer, then I should see log entries streaming in real-time
Given log entries are being generated, when I filter by log level (ERROR, WARN, INFO, DEBUG), then only matching entries should be displayed
Given the live log is active, when I pause the stream, then new log entries should buffer without displaying until I resume

tasks.description: Implement WebSocket connection for real-time log streaming
Create log viewer UI with filtering and pause/resume controls
Add log level filtering and search functionality
